Tool_gst_annual_return_Description: Educational GSTR-9 style check: outward supplies × GST% vs tax paid — see excess or shortfall (not a filing tool).
Tool_gst_annual_return_Subtitle: Outward supplies × rate vs tax paid
Tool_gst_annual_return_LearnText: Enter taxable outward supplies, an effective GST rate, and tax already paid. Compare liability with paid amount to see excess, shortfall, or balance — educational only, not GSTR-9 filing.
Tool_gst_annual_return_FormulaNote: Simplified reconciliation. ITC splits, late fees, and portal tables are not modelled. Confirm with a GST practitioner.
Tool_gst_annual_return_RateHint: Illustrative blended rate on outward supplies (e.g. 18%).
Tool_gst_annual_return_ScenarioSubtitle: Same outward supplies, different tax paid
Tool_gst_annual_return_ExampleStep_5: This is an educational check only — not a substitute for GSTR-9.
Tool_gst_annual_return_Step_1: Enter taxable outward supplies for the year.
Tool_gst_annual_return_Info_Purpose: Compare tax paid with a simple liability on outward supplies.
Tool_gst_annual_return_Info_WhyKnow: Annual return season often needs a quick paid-vs-liability sense-check before filing.
Tool_gst_annual_return_Info_RealLife: Traders reconciling GSTR-3B payments against yearly outward supplies.
Tool_gst_annual_return_Info_Goal_1: Estimate GST liability on outward supplies
Tool_gst_annual_return_Info_Alt_Freelanc: When you also track income tax on receipts.
Tool_gst_annual_return_Info_Differentiat: FinYatra shows paid vs liability difference without pretending to file GSTR-9.
Tool_gst_annual_return_Info_Motto: Paid vs liability — before you file.
Tool_epfo_passbook_Description: Project EPF closing balance from opening, monthly contributions, months, and interest rate — mini passbook style.
Tool_epfo_passbook_LearnText: Enter opening balance, combined monthly EPF contribution, months, and rate. See projected closing, total contributions, and interest — a simplified passbook projection.
Tool_epfo_passbook_FormulaNote: Monthly interest approximation. Official EPFO credits interest yearly with specific rules — educational only.
Tool_epfo_passbook_MonthlyHint: Employee + employer EPF share combined (not EPS).
Tool_epfo_passbook_ExampleStep_2: Each month: add contribution, then interest at rate/12.
Tool_epfo_passbook_ExampleStep_5: Longer tenure compounds more interest on a growing balance.
Tool_epfo_passbook_Info_Purpose: Estimate how your EPF balance may grow over coming months.
Tool_epfo_passbook_Info_WhyKnow: Helps plan withdrawals, loans, or retirement corpus from a passbook view.
Tool_epfo_passbook_Info_RealLife: Salaried employees checking UAN passbook growth.
Tool_epfo_passbook_Info_Alt_Epf_When: For multi-year corpus from basic wages.
Tool_epfo_passbook_Info_Alt_Nps_When: For NPS Tier-I corpus, not EPF.
Tool_epfo_passbook_Info_Differentiation: FinYatra gives a simple opening + months passbook projection alongside full EPF tools.
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_Description: Section 10(5) LTA: claimed vs exempt limit and taxable excess — with 2 trips / 4-year block note.
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_LearnText: Enter LTA claimed, exempt limit (eligible fare), and trips used in the block. See exempt vs taxable amount under simplified Section 10(5) rules.
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_FormulaNote: Actual exemption depends on fare proofs and block-year rules. Up to 2 journeys in a 4-year block (illustrative).
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_ExemptHint: Usually eligible travel fare for the journey(s).
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_TripsHint: Typically up to {0} trips in a {1}-year block.
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_ExampleStep_: If trips exceed the block limit, exemption may be nil in this simplified model.
Keep fare proofs — employers and IT may ask for them.
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_Step_3: Set trips used in the 4-year block.
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_Info_Purpose: Estimate how much LTA is exempt vs taxable.
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_Info_WhyKnow: Over-claiming without fare support can create taxable salary.
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_Info_RealLif: Employees claiming LTA reimbursement for domestic travel.
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_Info_Alt_Hra: For house rent exemption, not travel.
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_Info_Differe: Same Sec 10(5) logic as FinYatra LTA — dedicated leave-travel-allowance route.
Tool_leave_travel_allowance_Info_Motto: Claim smart — keep the exempt part.
Tool_post_office_savings_Description: Post Office savings deposit with rate and compounding — see maturity and interest (educational).
Tool_post_office_savings_LearnText: Enter deposit, annual rate, years, and compounding frequency. See maturity and total interest using A = P(1+r/n)^(n×t).
Tool_post_office_savings_FormulaNote: Illustrative. POSA and other schemes have specific rates and rules — confirm with India Post / NSI.
Tool_post_office_savings_RateHint: POSA is often near ~4% — enter the rate you want to model.
Tool_post_office_savings_ScenarioSubtitl: Same deposit and rate, different frequency
Tool_post_office_savings_ExampleTitle: Worked example: ₹1 lakh at 4% for 5 years
Tool_post_office_savings_ExampleStep_4: Monthly compounding earns slightly more than annual.
Tool_post_office_savings_ExampleStep_5: Compare with PO TD / MIS for different goals.
Tool_post_office_savings_Info_Abbreviati: PO savings — compound interest on deposit
Tool_post_office_savings_Info_Purpose: Estimate interest on a Post Office-style savings deposit.
Tool_post_office_savings_Info_WhyKnow: Helps compare POSA-style returns with bank savings or TD.
Tool_post_office_savings_Info_RealLife: Small deposits parked in Post Office savings.
Tool_post_office_savings_Info_Differenti: FinYatra models PO savings compounding next to TD, MIS, and PPF tools.
Tool_central_govt_salary_slip_Descriptio: 7th CPC-style slip: basic, DA%, HRA%, allowances and deductions → gross and net pay.
Tool_central_govt_salary_slip_LearnText: Enter basic pay, DA%, HRA%, other allowances, and total deductions. See DA, HRA, gross, and net — a simplified central government salary slip.
Tool_central_govt_salary_slip_FormulaNot: Illustrative. Actual slips include NPS, CGEGIS, income tax, and city-class HRA — confirm with your DDO / payslip.
Tool_central_govt_salary_slip_HraHint: Often 30% / 20% / 10% by city class — enter your rate.
Tool_central_govt_salary_slip_Deductions: NPS, CGEGIS, income tax, and other recoveries combined.
Tool_central_govt_salary_slip_ExampleSte: Gross = basic + DA + HRA + other allowances.
A DA hike raises both gross and net if deductions stay fixed.
Tool_central_govt_salary_slip_Step_4: Gross = sum of earnings; net = gross − deductions.
Tool_central_govt_salary_slip_Info_Abbre: Central govt payslip — basic + DA + HRA
Tool_central_govt_salary_slip_Info_Purpo: Estimate gross and net from a simplified 7th CPC-style slip.
Tool_central_govt_salary_slip_Info_WhyKn: DA revisions and HRA city class change take-home quickly.
Tool_central_govt_salary_slip_Info_RealL: Central government employees checking monthly in-hand.
Tool_central_govt_salary_slip_Info_Diffe: FinYatra builds a central-govt style slip with DA and HRA percentages in one view.
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_Description: Side-by-side Sukanya Samriddhi vs PPF maturity for the same annual deposit — rate and tenure advantage.
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_Subtitle: Same deposit → SSY vs PPF maturity
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_LearnText: Enter one annual deposit (capped at ₹1.5 lakh) and rates. Compare SSY (15 deposit years, mature at 21) with PPF (15 years) side by side.
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_FormulaNote: SSY is for a girl child; PPF is open to individuals. Rates change quarterly — educational comparison only.
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_DepositHint: Max ₹1.5 lakh per year for both schemes (shared cap in this tool).
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_ExampleStep_2: SSY: deposit 15 years, interest continues to year 21 at 8.2%.
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_ExampleStep_3: PPF: 15 years at 7.1% with annual compounding.
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_ExampleStep_4: Gap = SSY maturity − PPF maturity (often favours SSY on rate + time).
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_ExampleStep_5: Eligibility differs — SSY needs a girl child account.
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_Step_1: Enter the same annual deposit for both.
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_Step_3: Project SSY to year 21 and PPF to year 15.
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_Info_Purpose: Compare Sukanya Samriddhi and PPF for the same yearly deposit.
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_Info_WhyKnow: Both are EEE small-savings favourites — rate and tenure differ.
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_Info_RealLife: Parents choosing between SSY and PPF for long-term goals.
Tool_ssy_vs_ppf_Info_Differentiation: FinYatra puts SSY and PPF maturity on one screen for the same deposit.
